articles.title: NIKE, Inc. $NKE Shares Purchased by Allstate Corp
articles.summary: Allstate Corp significantly increased its stake in NIKE, Inc. during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 44,936 shares and bringing its total holdings to 88,277 shares valued at approximately $5.6 million. Several other institutional investors also boosted their positions in NKE, with institutions and hedge funds collectively owning 64.25% of the stock. NIKE recently reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.41 per share.
